hero.subtitle: Premium cutting and grooming services for modern men

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: The Art of Barbering, A Legacy of Tradition
about.description1: Prestige Barbershop was established in 2010 with a vision to deliver world-class barbershop experience. Every cut is a work of art, every style is an expression of personality.
about.description2: Our barbermen are trained in traditional European techniques combined with modern innovations, ensuring every client receives special attention and perfect results.

services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.title: Premium Services
services.subtitle: Each service is designed with attention to detail and client satisfaction

gallery.label: GALLERY
gallery.title: Our Craft
gallery.subtitle: Inspiration from every cut and style we create

testimonials.label: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.testimonial1: Best experience ever! The barbers at Prestige are very professional and the cuts are perfect. I've become a regular customer.
testimonials.testimonial2: Relaxed yet premium atmosphere. I feel valued as a client here. Highly recommended for all men who care about their appearance.
testimonials.testimonial3: Fast, neat, and professional service. Price matches quality. This is the right place for quality grooming.

cta.title: Ready to Look Your Best?
cta.subtitle: Schedule your grooming session with Prestige Barbershop experts

footer.about: Prestige Barbershop is where style meets precision. We are committed to delivering world-class barbershop services.
